description: Style NoteThis stone washed denim dress from doodle is perfectly in tune with the latest fashion trends. For a day out with the family or while hanging out with friends, this dress will give her an uber cool look. Product DetailsDenim stone washed sleeveless dress, has a cutaway collar with a half buttoned placket, mock patch pockets with flaps on the chest, crumpled look at the edge of the collar and flaps of the mock patch pockets, back yoke, loops with a pink belt through it on the hip, two insert pockets in front below it with a coin pocket inside the right insert pocket, two patch pockets at the back under the belt with a crumpled look and a slit at the back in the centreMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash coldTumble dry lowUse warm iron
